text:
Created attachment 161511
make output

attempting to build results in a message to build with "MAKE_JOBS_UNSFAE=yes". Re-running with this produces...

gmake[4]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/x11/gnome-desktop/work/gnome-desktop-3.16.2/desktop-docs/fdl'
  GEN      ar/ar.mo
  GEN    ar/
Makefile:584: recipe for target 'ar/ar.stamp' failed
